# Pull Request Checklist

## Change Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] official source update
- [ ] field-practice proposal
- [ ] tool-card update
- [ ] shortcut-card update
- [ ] pricing snapshot update
- [ ] index/routing fix
- [ ] validator/schema change
- [ ] typo/readability change
- [ ] license/governance change
- [ ] other

## Scope

- Affected topic IDs:
- Evidence level:
- Source IDs added/changed:
- Indexes updated:
- Registers updated:
- `manifest.json` changed: yes/no
- `llms.txt` / `llms-full.txt` changed: yes/no

## Validation

- Validator result:
- Stable vs volatile guidance impact:
- Introduces or changes a community-field-practice claim: yes/no
- Introduces pricing/model/tool availability claim: yes/no

## Notes

Explain any source posture, routing, register, manifest, or validator implications reviewers should verify.
